user_feedback: can you remove the control section part from the main screen, and can you make sure to add cooler animations for each thing, and why is the main player always shaking? its kind of weird
analysis:
- Issue identified: The user wants to remove the on-screen control buttons to clean up the UI. Additionally, the player character (Robot) has a "shaking" glitch effect that the user finds weird and wants removed. Finally, the user requested "cooler animations" for game entities.
- Files affected:
    - `index.html`: Contains the control buttons HTML and related script.
    - `entities.js`: Contains the rendering logic for Robot and Enemy, including the shaking effect.
    - `ui.js`: Contains the rendering logic for the grid and Exit tile.
- Changes needed:
    - In `index.html`: Remove the `<div class="control-buttons">` block and the `<script>` block defining `setMode`.
    - In `entities.js`:
        - `Robot`: Remove the `p.translate` random jitter (shaking). Add a rotating outer ring and particle trails during movement for "cooler" visuals.
        - `Enemy`: Add rotation to the spiky body to make it dynamic.
    - In `ui.js`: Update the Exit tile rendering to include a rotating frame animation.
